since_last: 73% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.87%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.82% · BTC +0.34% · Gold +1.58% · Nasdaq100 +1.42%. 73% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.87%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.87%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.04%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.04%, ANET +7.24%, AMD +6.88%, INOD +6.57%, VRT +6.36%. Laggards: AVAV -5.29%, SPCX -3.72%, UPST -2.93%, OKLO -2.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.72% at $155.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
